word: G3763 - οὐδέποτε - oudépote - oo-dep'-ot-eh - Neither at any time

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οὐδέποτε

- Transliteration: Oudepote

- Phonetic: oo-dep'-ot-eh

- Definition:

1. never

- Origin: from G3761 and G4218

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G3761 and G4218; not even at any time that is never at all: - neither at any time never nothing at any time.
